results.title: LangGraph
results.description: LangGraph is a low-level orchestration framework for building, managing, and deploying long-running, stateful agents.

results.title: LangChain LangGraph
results.description: LangGraph is a low-level orchestration framework and runtime for building, managing, and deploying long-running, stateful agents, offering durable execution, human-in-the-loop capabilities, and comprehensive memory.

results.title: LangGraph
results.description: LangGraph is a low-level orchestration framework for building, managing, and deploying long-running, stateful agents. It provides durable execution, comprehensive memory, human-in-the-loop capabilities, and production-ready deployment for complex agent workflows.

results.title: LangGraph
results.description: LangGraph is a low-level orchestration framework for building, managing, and deploying long-running, stateful agents and workflows, offering durable execution, human-in-the-loop capabilities, and comprehensive memory.

results.title: Deep Agents
results.description: Deep Agents is a standalone library built on LangGraph for constructing intelligent agents capable of planning, utilizing subagents, and managing context with file systems to tackle complex, multi-step tasks.

results.title: LangGraph
results.description: LangGraph is a low-level orchestration framework and runtime for building, managing, and deploying long-running, stateful agents and workflows, focusing on durable execution, human-in-the-loop, and comprehensive memory.

results.title: LangChain
results.description: LangChain is a framework designed to simplify the creation of applications powered by large language models (LLMs), offering tools to build agents, connect to various model providers, and standardize model interactions.

results.title: LangGraph Supervisor
results.description: A Python library for creating hierarchical multi-agent systems using LangGraph, where a central supervisor agent orchestrates specialized agents through tool-based communication and flexible message history management.

results.title: LangGraph
results.description: LangGraph is a platform for building adaptable AI agents and multi-agent systems, offering components for state management, memory, human-in-the-loop controls, and flexible deployment.

results.title: LangChain v1.0
results.description: LangChain v1.0 is a focused, production-ready foundation for building agents, featuring a new `create_agent` standard, unified content blocks, and a simplified namespace.

results.title: LangGraph
results.description: Build resilient language agents as graphs.

results.title: Deep Agents UI
results.description: A user interface designed to work with LangChain's 'deep-agents' package, enabling users to interact with generic AI agents capable of handling various tasks.

results.title: LangChain
results.description: LangChain is a framework for developing applications powered by language models, offering tools for building complex LLM workflows and agents.

results.title: Agent Inbox
results.description: Agent Inbox is a user interface designed to allow human users to review and respond to interrupts from LangGraph agents, providing a mechanism for human-in-the-loop interaction with AI agents.

results.title: LangGraph Big Tool
results.description: Build LangGraph agents with large numbers of tools

results.title: Deep Agents
results.description: A TypeScript package for creating Deep Agents that overcome the limitations of simple LLM agents by implementing planning tools, sub-agents, file system access, and detailed prompts for complex tasks.

results.title: Fast-agent
results.description: Fast-Agent is a Python framework for building and orchestrating AI agents, supporting file attachments, MCP resources, and complex workflows like chaining and human input.

results.title: Langgraph Swarm
results.description: A Python library built on LangGraph for creating swarm-style multi-agent systems where specialized agents dynamically hand off control and resume conversations; includes customizable handoff tools, streaming, memory, and human-in-the-loop support.

results.title: Deep Agents
results.description: Deep Agents is a standalone library for building intelligent agents that can plan, manage context through file systems, spawn subagents, and handle complex multi-step tasks.

results.title: LangGraph.js (llmstxt)
results.description: LangGraph.js is an open-source JavaScript/TypeScript framework for building, orchestrating, and deploying AI agent workflows and complex LLM applications via composable graphs, with integrated support for persistence, streaming, human-in-the-loop, and memory.

results.title: LangChain
results.description: LangChain is a framework for developing applications powered by large language models (LLMs), designed to overcome their limitations by integrating them with external data sources and computational tools, especially through Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG).

results.title: Deep Agents
results.description: Deep Agents is a Python package that implements a general-purpose architecture for creating advanced agents capable of planning and acting over complex tasks by combining planning tools, sub-agents, file system access, and detailed prompts.

results.title: LangMem
results.description: LangMem provides tooling to help AI agents learn and adapt from their interactions over time by extracting, managing, and maintaining long-term memory, enabling continuous improvement and personalized responses.

results.title: Open Agent Platform (llmstxt)
results.description: Open Agent Platform is a framework for building, configuring, and deploying custom AI agents.

results.title: LangGraphJS
results.description: Framework to build resilient language agents as graphs.

results.title: Lucid Agents
results.description: A protocol-agnostic TypeScript framework for building, deploying, and monetizing autonomous AI agents with built-in payment infrastructure, on-chain identity, and agent-to-agent communication capabilities.

results.title: LangChain JavaScript
results.description: LangChain JavaScript is a framework for developing AI applications, offering tools for LLM integration, orchestration, and observability.

results.title: Orkes Conductor
results.description: Orkes Conductor is an enterprise platform for building highly reliable applications and AI agents, enabling orchestration of distributed applications, agentic workflows, and event-driven architectures.

results.title: LangChain (llmstxt)
results.description: LangChain is a framework for building applications powered by large language models, providing standardized component interfaces, orchestration capabilities, and tools for evaluation and observability.
